name: Took adjuster call already, did I mess up my claim?
description: Maybe; lawyer up, say no more.[2][4]

mainEntity.name: Took adjuster call already, did I mess up my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe; lawyer up, say no more.[2][4]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Possibly; recorded statements can be twisted—stop talking and get a lawyer immediately.**

Insurers seek admissions against you.[4][2] No obligation to chat without counsel.

**Key factors:**
- What you admitted (e.g., non-use).
- Written everything down.
- Haven't signed releases.
- Early attorney intervention.

Lawyer reviews call, counters spin.[2] Many recover anyway.

Silence protects now.
